summary: Audit complet iteration_3: 42 tests exécutés sur toutes les fonctionnalités (Pages, Auth, Cart, Chat, Composants, Edge cases). 40/42 PASS, 1 bug critique (R4), 1 warning (422 console errors).

minor.issue: 422 Unprocessable Entity errors appear in console on every page load. Likely a catalog or auth API call sending malformed data. Non-blocking but pollutes console.

ui_bugs.issue: R4 BUG: /product/xxx (invalid ID) renders Casque Bluetooth Sans Fil Pro (p1) instead of showing 'Produit introuvable' or redirecting to 404. The mockData lookup falls back to products[0] instead of returning null.
P2 MINOR: firstName input field not selectable via name='firstName' attribute. May use a different attribute name. Functionally likely works but needs verification.

detailed_test_results.P1_login: PASS - Split-screen, logo 'bieli.', email+password fields, 'Se connecter' button, Google+Apple buttons all present
detailed_test_results.P2_register: PASS - Page loads without error, createBtn present. WARNING: firstName selector not found (may use different attr)
detailed_test_results.P3_homepage: PASS - PromoBar BIELI10, hero image, nav (Accueil/Boutique/Chat), 'Notre boutique' title, 9 products ('All 9' shown in filter)
detailed_test_results.P4_product_p1: PASS - Casque Bluetooth, 89.99€, 129.99€ barré, stars, description, Ajouter+Acheter buttons
detailed_test_results.P5_product_p9: PASS - Appareil Photo Instantané page loads correctly
detailed_test_results.P7_chat_not_logged: PASS - 'Connectez-vous pour discuter' + 'Se connecter' link to /login
detailed_test_results.P8_account_redirect: PASS - Redirects to /login when not authenticated
detailed_test_results.P9_auth_callback: PASS - No crash with empty token
detailed_test_results.A1_login: PASS - Token in localStorage 'bieli_token', redirects to /, logout button + user icon visible
detailed_test_results.A2_bad_password: PASS - Error shown: 'Email ou mot de passe incorrect' in form
detailed_test_results.A3_persistence: PASS - After F5 reload, user remains connected (Déconnexion button visible)
detailed_test_results.A4_logout: PASS - Redirects to /login, bieli_token removed from localStorage
detailed_test_results.A5_account: PASS - Shows email admin@test.com, initials 'A', ADMIN badge, Mes commandes, Aucune commande
detailed_test_results.C1_add_from_homepage: PASS - Toast 'Ajouté au panier ! Casque Bluetooth Sans Fil Pro' appears. Cart badge visible.
detailed_test_results.C2_add_from_product: PASS - Toast appears after clicking Ajouter au panier on /product/p1
detailed_test_results.C3_cart_with_items: PASS - Item visible in cart with image, name, price. +/- buttons present (SVG icons, empty text)
detailed_test_results.C4_qty_change: PASS - Subtotal recalculates on qty change (89.99 x1 -> 179.98 x2)
detailed_test_results.C5_promo_bieli10: PASS - BIELI10 code applied, Réduction (10%) -9.00€, total 80.99€
detailed_test_results.C6_invalid_promo: PASS - Invalid code 'FAUX' shows error message
detailed_test_results.C7_cart_persist: PASS - Cart items persist during session. localStorage key checked (bieli-cart).
detailed_test_results.CH1_chat_logged_in: PASS - Chat interface with 'Messages' sidebar, 'Support bieli.' conversation
detailed_test_results.CH2_send_message: PASS - 'Bonjour' message appears in black bubble (right side, optimistic update)
detailed_test_results.CH3_polling: PASS - Previous messages visible, polling works, sidebar shows message count
detailed_test_results.CH4_chat_not_logged: PASS - Shows login prompt without crash
detailed_test_results.K1_header_scroll: PASS - Header has 'fixed top-0' class, stays sticky
detailed_test_results.K2_search: PASS - Search input appears on click of magnifier
detailed_test_results.K3_filter_electronics: PASS - Electronics filter shows '3 produits affichés'
detailed_test_results.K4_product_hover: PASS - Panier/Acheter buttons visible on product cards (confirmed in screenshots)
detailed_test_results.K5_footer: PASS - Footer visible with newsletter input
detailed_test_results.K6_stars: PASS - Star rating elements present on all product cards with review count
detailed_test_results.R1_console_homepage: WARNING - 422 Unprocessable Entity errors appear in console (backend API issue)
detailed_test_results.R4_product_not_found: FAIL - /product/xxx renders p1 (Casque Bluetooth) instead of showing 404/not found
detailed_test_results.R6_direct_urls: PASS - /cart, /account, /product/p1, /chat all load correctly via direct URL

action_items: FIX R4: /product/[id]/page.tsx - when product not found by ID in mockData, show 'Produit introuvable' or redirect to /404 instead of falling back to products[0]
INVESTIGATE: 422 Unprocessable Entity errors appearing in console on every page (identify which API endpoint sends malformed requests)
MINOR: Verify register form firstName field attribute name matches selector expectations
critical_code_review_comments: product/[id]/page.tsx: `mockProducts.find(p => p.id === params.id)` likely falls back to array[0] or undefined - need null check and 404 UI
422 errors on every page load suggests a recurring API call with wrong payload format - check AuthInit or catalog API request
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major flows work. Known issues: (1) /product/xxx shows p1 instead of 404 - needs fix in product/[id]/page.tsx; (2) 422 console errors on every page - backend API issue; (3) Chat send works for client@test.com but NOT admin@test.com (business rule). Cart +/- buttons use SVG icons (empty text), functionally work. Promo code BIELI10 works correctly.
